reviews.review_title: Good, by Picture Quality is bad
reviews.review_description:
Thank you very much for this useful app. I am really happy that there is such a specific VR application for vision and binocular training. I think the concept is excellent, especially for amblyopia therapy and encouraging the weaker eye to participate more actively.

In my case, the app motivates my left “lazy eye” much more effectively because the image for the dominant right eye is intentionally reduced. I can definitely recommend the app and I believe it has a lot of potential for people with binocular vision or fusion problems.

One thing that could really improve the experience is the video quality. It does not need to be 4K, but at least HD quality for the YouTube videos would make a huge difference. At the moment, the low resolution and compression make longer sessions quite tiring and reduce the overall enjoyment and visual comfort.

I really hope this can be improved in a future update, because the app itself is a very promising and valuable idea.

Auf Deutsch: Vielen Dank für diese nützliche App. Bin sehr froh, dass es so eine spezifische App für das Augentraining gibt. 
Ist ein sehr guter Ansatz für die Behandlung von Amblyopie. Mein linkes, faules Auge wird dadurch stärker motiviert, weil das Bild für das rechte Auge entsprechend reduziert ist. Kann die App auch empfehlen. 
Leider ist jedoch die Bildqualität insgesamt sehr schlecht - es muss ja nicht unbedingt 4K sein, aber mindestens HD-Qualität müssten die Videos von YouTube haben. Sonst macht die Sache wenig Spass, und lange Sessions werden sehr mühsam. 

Hoffe sehr, dass dies noch angepasst werden kann.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review. We are very happy that it helps you improve your eyesight so all the best wishes from amblyotube so that you improve your eyesight as fast as possible . We undertand that video quality is not that great and are in touch with our content providers like youtube to find a solution for it.  Thank you again for your feedback
